title: Elymus × interjacens
intro: Elymus × interjacens, also known as intermediate wheatgrass, is a hybrid of two grass species, Elymus canadensis and Elymus smithii, often used as a food source and medicinal plant. The health benefits of Elymus × interjacens include its potential to help lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and aid in digestion, making it a popular choice for individuals seeking natural remedies. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Elymus × interjacens include teas, tinctures, and capsules, often used to support cardiovascular health and immune function.
